{{Infobox character
| name = Tristania
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|dark whip that produces pale light and lightning, explosive whip}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|, [[Soulbound Vessel]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Silent One|the Silent One]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Guild of Witnesses]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Chronicler}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Tristania Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Tristania, known as the [[Silent One]], serves as a warrior and bodyguard for [[Naberius Clayborn]]. She was discovered abandoned in a building during a [[Kameira]] rampage and subsequently adopted by [[Naberius]]. Though she lacks a family name, she is roughly the same age as her employer. Her combat abilities and training are partially self-taught, having spent time in a [[Kanatalia]] laboratory. Physically, she is characterized by her black hair and the fact that she wraps her entire body in bandages, a practice likely intended to conceal injuries. She typically wears a high-collared coat that is magically invested to act as armor against projectiles like bullets. In combat, she utilizes a [[Soulbound Vessel]]—a dark, explosive whip fashioned from a [[Stormwing]]'s stinger—which she can use to deliver concussive strikes or detonating white light. She is a highly alert combatant, capable of defending [[Naberius]] and utilizing various methods to neutralize threats, ranging from her whip to direct energy discharges.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A member of the [[Guild of Witnesses]] known as the [[Silent One]], Tristania was self-taught in a [[Kanatalia]] laboratory. While traveling with [[Naberius]], she wore bandages over her eyes and kept weapons hidden within her coat. During a voyage on a ship with [[Calder]], she utilized a dark whip that produced lightning and pale light. After [[Shera]] struck her back while she was covering [[Naberius]], Tristania used an explosive whip to battle the [[Children of Nakothi]]. Following these events, she was carried by members of the [[Blackwatch]], though she was ultimately shot in the back of the head and killed by [[Naberius]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is wrapped in bandages.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] wears bandages over her eyes and keeps weapons in her coat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is known as the [[Silent One]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is a member of the [[Guild of Witnesses]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] was self-taught in a [[Kanatalia]] laboratory.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is traveling with [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] reached a hand inside her coat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is someone whose throat could be slit by assassins.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] uses a dark whip that produces pale light and lightning.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is on the ship with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is a character who was covering [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Shera]] struck [[Tristania]]'s back.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] uses an explosive whip to fight the [[Children of Nakothi]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is a person being carried by [[Blackwatch]] members.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] has a high, clear, young, and weary voice.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] was shot in the back of the head by [[Naberius]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Tristania]] is a person whom [[Naberius]] killed.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Tristania is a [[Chronicler]] and the partner of [[Naberius]], who adopted her when they were roughly the same age. She is sheathed from head to toe in bandages and wears a brown coat that has been invested to stop bullets. Her equipment includes a dark whip acting as a [[Soulbound Vessel]], and she also possesses a [[Stormwing]] tail [[Vessel]]. Through this connection, she is [[Soulbound]] to the [[Awakened]] tail of a [[Stormwing]]. During her experiences, she was once climbed upon by a giant beetle.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] is a woman of roughly the same age as [[Naberius]] who was adopted by him.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] is a [[Chronicler]] and [[Naberius]]'s partner.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] is sheathed head-to-toe in bandages and wears a brown coat.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] possesses a [[Soulbound Vessel]] in the form of a dark whip.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] is [[Soulbound]] to the [[Awakened]] tail of a [[Stormwing]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]]'s coat is invested to stop bullets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A giant beetle clambered up on [[Tristania]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Tristania]] possesses a [[Stormwing]] tail [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Guild of Witnesses]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
